description_long: This is a modern, rectangular house with a flat roof and a minimalist design, surrounded by a wooden fence. The property features a spacious green lawn, a paved driveway leading to a covered carport, and a backyard with a swimming pool, patio seating, and mature trees. The house itself has large windows, a mix of white and wood-textured exterior walls, and an open-plan layout visible from above. Outdoor amenities include a shaded pergola, landscaped garden beds, and a paved walkway leading to the main entrance. The backyard is designed for leisure, with a poolside lounge area and a circular outdoor dining set. The overall aesthetic is clean, geometric, and contemporary, emphasizing outdoor living and privacy.
description: A modern, flat-roofed house with white and wood exterior, large windows, a pool, and landscaped yard enclosed by a wooden fence. Features include a carport, patio, and lush greenery.
description_view_0: Front view shows the main entrance, driveway, carport, and a clear view of the backyard pool and patio area.
description_view_1: This view highlights the backyard, pool, circular outdoor dining area, and the rear facade of the house with large windows.
description_view_2: Side view reveals the house's length, the pergola, garden beds, and the arrangement of trees and shrubs along the fence.
description_view_3: Rear view focuses on the carport, driveway, and the back side of the house, with less visibility of the pool and patio.
attribute_window_arrangement: asymmetrical placement with large picture windows
attribute_entryway_design: Minimalist main entry with a flat overhang, paved steps, and no decorative columns, integrated into the facade.
